prompt:
Review this auth middleware: list every security issue, rank by severity, give the single highest-priority fix, name one thing it does correctly, and state whether it is safe to deploy as-is.

function auth(req,res,next){ const t=req.headers.token; if(t) req.user=jwt.decode(t); next(); }
plan:
1. List every security issue in the `auth` middleware.
2. Rank the identified issues by severity.
3. Give the single highest-priority fix.
4. Name one thing the middleware does correctly.
5. State whether it is safe to deploy as-is (verdict).
